title: alchemilla vulgaris var. micans
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. micans, also known as the silver-leaved lady's mantle, is a variety of the A. vulgaris plant that is characterized by its striking silvery-gray foliage. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a popular treatment for wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of A. vulgaris var. micans include its ability to soothe and calm digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
